data.title: Japanese Firms Add 156.79 BTC as Bitcoin Drags — Metaplanet Leads, 4 Join Treasury Push
data.description:
Bitcoin’s recent price drag hasn’t deterred several major Japanese firms; instead, Metaplanet, Remixpoint, ANAP, Agile Media Network, and Def Consulting have together added over 156. 79 BTC to their treasuries.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/japanese-firms-add-156-79-btc-as-bitcoin-drags-metaplanet-leads-4-join-treasury-push/

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury Holdings Report: Week of August 18-25, 2025
data.description: According to data from CoinGecko, as of August 25, 2025, the companies with the largest Bitcoin treasury holdings are as follows:Strategy (MSTR) holds 629,376 BTC, worth approximately $70.80 billion.Marathon Digital Holdings (MARA) holds 50,639 BTC, worth approximately $5.67 billion.Twenty One Capital (CEP) holds 37,229.7 BTC, worth approximately $4.87 billion.Bitcoin Standard Treasury Company holds 30,021 BTC, worth approximately $3.36 billion.Riot Platforms (RIOT) holds 19,239 BTC, worth approximately $2.15 billion. In the week of August 18-25, 2025, Strategy reported it had purchased 430 BTC, at a cost of $51 million.In the same week, Metaplanet reported it had purchased 103 BTC, at a cost of $11.7 million.

data.title: Nasdaq’s Sharps Technology completes a $400M PIPE financing for Solana treasury
data.description:
Drug delivery solutions company Sharps Technology, Inc. has announced a private placement financing valued at more than $400 million to support the creation of a digital asset treasury centered on Solana’s native token, SOL. According to a Monday press release revealing the funding round, the private investment in public equity transaction (PIPE) will include the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sharps-tech-completes-a-400m-solana-treasury/

data.title: BNB Surpasses 870 USDT with a 0.59% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Aug 25, 2025, 14:50 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 870 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 870.719971 USDT, with a narrowed 0.59% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: xAI Files Antitrust Lawsuit Against Apple and OpenAI in Texas Court
data.description: According to PANews, xAI, a company led by Elon Musk, has filed a lawsuit in a Texas court against Apple and OpenAI. The lawsuit accuses both companies of violating antitrust laws. This legal action highlights ongoing tensions in the tech industry regarding competitive practices and market dominance.

data.title: Crypto ETPs post $1.4B losses amid recent Bitcoin, Ether sell-offs
data.description:
